title: Small Granite Mortar and Pestle Set - 1 Cup - for Fine Grinding Results - Includes Sustainable FSC® Wood Base - Easy to Clean
description:
About this item
Delicious Homemade Creations: The mortar allows you to make your own pesto, guacamole or spice blend for your favorite dishes.
Rock-solid Stability: Made from sustainable FSC wood, the heavy and sturdy base provides a stable grip and protects your tabletop from scratches.
Sustainable Grinder: Say goodbye to plastic and embrace natural materials in your kitchen. The product and packaging are 100% plastic free.
Full Flavor: The hard and textured granite allows you to finely grind both soft and hard spices, unlocking their full flavor potential.
Easy To Clean: Simply rinse the mortar with cold water and wipe with a cloth. Let it dry and it's ready for your next culinary adventure. The granite stone maintains a consistent, neutral odor.
reviews_5s:
Does a really good job quickly grinding whatever for cooking or if someone has trouble swallowing tablet prescriptions! Easy and thorough!A little something special on wife’s list. Smaller size so does not take up much room. Won’t scratch counter.grinds much better than the stainless one i am replacing - looks very nice tooThis is the best size for our kitchen. We love it.I am so happy with my purchase of this mortar & pestle set, Its lovely, well made and I love it.Love this little mortar/pestle set. I make my own spice mixes. Making them has always been hard with a bowl and a wooden spoon. A recommendation was given to me so I ordered it. It works like a charm, doesn't take up much room and works perfectly! Of course 5 stars!!Just received, this night. Beautiful workmanship, nice weight, handsome wooden base. Very happy, can't wait to use it.This product is well made with attention to detail. Haven't used it yet and can't waitThis mortar pestle is small, compact, does the job perfectly, easy to clean and use, fits in the kitchen drawer.
the cover prevents the damage of the drawer/countertop.This is very very great quality! I love the wooden touch and I can’t wait to use this! (I need to oil it with olive oil before I will be using this)
reviews_1s:
It's was perfect till it broke. Pestle broke in two when it was in use. If it was granite it wouldn't break so easily! I have used gorilla glue to fix it, not sure how long it would stay intact.

I would definitely not recommend buying this. I have just used it for over 2 months now.The bowl of the set arrived cracked with a portion of the rim cracked off. It was not a clean break; almost like the edges were crumbling around the crack. The box stated it was made of “granite material”. I assume this is reconstituted stone.No entiendo por que alguien venderia un mortero tan pequeñitoBeim Mörsern ensteht reichlich Granitstaub durch Abrieb, den ich nicht in meinem Essen haben möchte!
